mapper.select: SELECT id, name, scientific_name, category, sub_category, space_requirement, space_desc, time_requirement, budget_min, budget_max, temp_min, temp_max, humidity_min, humidity_max, need_uvb, interaction_level, noise_level, beginner_friendly, lifespan, legal_status, legal_desc, special_needs, common_health_issues, description, cover_image, created_at, updated_at FROM breed WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') OR category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') OR sub_category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') OR space_desc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') OR common_health_issues LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
